title: astragalus albens
intro: Astragalus albens, also known as milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It is a traditional medicinal herb used for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body adapt to stress and promote overall well-being. The plant contains flavonoids, saponins, and polysaccharides, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects, providing health benefits such as enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced fatigue. Astragalus albens can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
